items.title: Sector Update: Financial Stocks Mixed in Afternoon Trading
items.description: Financial stocks were mixed in Tuesday afternoon trading, with the NYSE Financial Index adding 0.3%

items.title: JPMorgan Chase Close to Deal Taking Over Apple Card Program, Reports Say
items.description: Apple and JPMorgan Chase are close to a deal for the banking giant to take over as the backer of Apple's credit card program, according to a Wall Street Journal report on Tuesday.

items.title: Top Blackstone Real Estate Executive Among Those Killed in Manhattan Shooting
items.description: A gunman opened fire in a busy New York office building on Monday, killing three people before turning the gun on himself.

items.title: JPMorgan Chase in Talks to Take Over Apple’s Credit Card Program, Report Says
items.description: JPMorgan Chase and Apple have been negotiating since last year, according to The Wall Street Journal.

items.title: Singapore Set to Hold Policy as Economy Shows Tariff Resilience
items.description: (Bloomberg) -- Singapore’s central bank will likely leave its monetary policy unchanged for the first time this year, adopting a wait-and-see approach as policymakers gauge looming US tariffs that risk weighing on growth.
